Petitioner Wynship Hillier'S Motion For New Trial
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Advanced From Jun-17-15 To Jun-10-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Petitioner Wynship Hillier'S Motion For New Trial
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Wynship Hillier, in pro per, Tel. 415.678.6335, for plaintiffs;
Wayne K. Snodgrass, of the Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4700, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner Wynship Hillier'S Motion For New Trial is denied. Plaintiff does not cite any meritorious basis for the court to revisit its ruling. The court never made a determination regarding who was the prevailing party and entitled to costs. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Order To Show Cause Or In The Alternative For The Issuance Of A Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-20-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - WYNSHIP HILLIER, TEL. NO. 678-6335, PETITIONER APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. WAYNE K. SNODGRASS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4675, APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause Or In The Alternative For The Issuance Of A Writ Of Mandate - The court denies the petition for writ of mandate as moot. The declarations of Nancy Sarieh and Jacquie Hale show that respondent has responded to petitioner's public records request. "[I]f respondent has complied with the petitioner's demands after issuance of the alternative writ, the writ has accomplished the purpose of the mandamus proceedings and the petition should be dismissed as moot." Bruce v. Gregory (1967) 65 Cal.2d 666, 671. In addition, respondent is obliged to make a reasonable effort-not an unlimited search-to respond adequately to petitioner's request. See Bertoli v. City of Sebastopol (2015) 233 Cal.App.4th 353, 372. The Request for a Statement of Decision was denied by the court. 1 Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR # 12913 =302/ehg

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Deposition Subpoena And Request For Monetary And Issue Sanctions (Cal Code Civ Proc. 2025.480(A) , 2023.040)
Off Calendar Mar-19-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance by either party, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PETITIONER WYNSHIP HILLIER's Motion To Compel Responses To Deposition Subpoena And Request For Monetary And Issue Sanctions (Cal Code Civ Proc. 2025.480(A) , 2023.040). Petitioner WYNSHIP HILLIER's Motion to Compel is DENIED. The Custodian of Records for Deponent has stated under oath on 2/5/15 that it does not have the documents requested in the deposition subpoena served on 1/23/15. The request for sanctions is DENIED. (Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order.)

Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
